name: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x Professional Studio Monitor Headphones

specs.Cable: 3 detachable cables included (1.2m straight, 3m straight, 1.2–3m coiled)

whatWorks: The ATH-M50x produces reference-accurate sound that professional audio engineers, podcast producers, music producers, and studio mixers have relied on for over a decade. The frequency response is honest enough to expose problems in a mix that consumer headphones would mask.

Three detachable cables cover every use case: the short straight cable for studio use at close proximity, the long 3m cable for distance from gear, and the coiled cable for general listening without tangles.

Closed-back design provides passive isolation that's critical for recording sessions — prevents bleed-through from monitor headphones into microphone recordings, something open-back alternatives can't offer.

Build quality exceeds the price point significantly — the reinforced pivot system, replaceable earpads, and replaceable cables make these a decade-long investment. Replacement parts are widely available and inexpensive.
worthKnowing: These are wired-only headphones — there is no Bluetooth or wireless version of the M50x (the M50xBT2 is the wireless variant, a different product). In 2026, wired-only is a meaningful limitation for many buyers.
The earcups use protein leather that traps heat during extended sessions — 2-3 hour listening sessions cause noticeable warmth around the ears, which can be uncomfortable in warm environments.
There is no in-line microphone on any of the three included cables — these are listening headphones, not communication headphones. Making calls requires a separate solution.

The bass response has a slight lift compared to true flat reference — professional engineers note this and EQ accordingly. Buyers expecting perfectly flat studio monitoring should be aware of this characteristic.

commonComplaints.title: Wired-only in 2026 is a hard…
commonComplaints.body: Wired-only in 2026 is a hard sell — I love the sound quality but the cable is a constant inconvenience at my desk.

commonComplaints.title: Earcups get warm and sweaty after…
commonComplaints.body: Earcups get warm and sweaty after about two hours — if you're in a warm room or do long sessions this will bother you.

commonComplaints.title: No microphone on any of the…
commonComplaints.body: No microphone on any of the cables — I assumed at least the short cable would have one. Had to buy a clip-on mic separately.

commonComplaints.title: Bass is slightly elevated vs flat…
commonComplaints.body: Bass is slightly elevated vs flat reference — not neutral enough for critical mixing without EQ correction, which I didn't expect at this price.

verdict: The Audio-Technica ATH-M50x is the benchmark closed-back studio headphone — the standard by which all others in the category are measured. Sound accuracy, build quality, and detachable cable versatility at $199 CAD represent exceptional value for podcasters, music producers, and home studio users. The wired-only format and heat buildup during long sessions are genuine limitations in 2026. Anyone working with audio who can accept a cable will find these the most honest and durable headphones available at the price.

realBuyers.quote: These are the industry standard for a reason — I can hear problems in my mixes that I was missing entirely with my old consumer headphones.
The three cables cover every situation — I use the coiled one at my desk and the long straight one when I'm tracking vocals.
I've had mine for 7 years. Replaced the earpads twice and one cable. These will outlast three pairs of any wireless headphones.
If you make music or podcasts these are non-negotiable — everything else at this price is a toy by comparison.

metaDescription: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x review for Canada: reference studio sound, 3 detachable cables, closed-back isolation, decade-proven build. Honest on wired-only and heat buildup. ~$199 CAD.
introText: The Audio-Technica ATH-M50x are the benchmark closed-back studio monitor headphones — trusted by professional audio engineers, podcasters, and music producers worldwide for their reference-accurate sound and bulletproof build quality. Available on Amazon.ca (ASIN B00HVLUR86) at around $199 CAD.
